DBT, DST, DRDO, ICMR, Ministry of Health, TRIFED and Industries) The Faculty has been awarded individual R&D projects to the tune of Rs 15.0 crores from different funding agencies as below: DBT 11 DST Ramanujan Fellowship 1 DBT (RGYI) 2 Industry 1 DST 4 TRIFED 1 DST-FIST 1 NMPB (MoH) 1 DST FAST-TRACK 12 DRDO 6 ICMR 3 MoEFCC 1 HIMCOSTE 03 DBT Skill Vigyan 01 Indo-US Bioenergy Award 01 DBT- MSc(GAT-B) 10 seats Jaypee Innovation Research Fund 01 Department of Environment Science and Technology, Shimla Himachal Pradesh 01 Complete list of R&D Projects DBT Sponsored  Center of Excellence The Department of Biotechnology, Ministry of Science & Technology has awarded Dept. of Bioptechnology & Bioinformatics, Jaypee University of Information Technology a Programme Support on “Elucidation of Biosynthetic Pathways & Development of Gene Markers for High Value Endangered Medicinal Herbs of North-Western Himalayas” under the scheme of Centers of Excellence & Innovation in Biotechnology. The programme support involved modern genomics approaches such as transcriptomics, proteomics, metabolomics and computational network analysis. The center focused on identification of genes involved in the biosynthesis of major chemical constituents in medicinal plants of importance to India. The outcome of the center resulted in the identification of genetically superior strains of high value medicinal plants but will also provided starting material towards metabolic  engineering of plants and microbial hosts. List of Patents Granted and Published Research Collaboration (National & International) Defense Institute of High Altitude Research, Leh Panjab University, Chandigarh Central University of Himachal Pradesh All India Institute of Medical Sciences, New Delhi Indira Gandhi Medical College, Shimla Guru Nanak Dev University, Amritsar, Panjab Central Potato Research Institute, Shimla National Bureau of Animal and Genetic Resources, Karnal IIT, Delhi IIT, Kharagpur IIT, Guwahati Amrita School of Biotechnology, Kollam Sardar Swaran Singh National Institute of Bioenergy, Kapurthala IIT, Allahabad IIT, Bhubaneswar NIT, Warangal Indian Agricultural Research Institute, New Delhi South Dakota School of Mines and Technology, SD, USA Gyeongsang National University, South Korea Yungnam University, South Korea University of Terenganu, Malaysia Stanford University Medical School, Stanford, USA Cranfield University, UK University of Boras, Swedan University of Sao-Paulo, Brazil DBT Skill Vigyan Project The Department of Biotechnology, GOI is supporting skill development programme in Biotechnology. The objective of skill development programme is to provide high quality hands on training of tools and techniques to graduate students in area of Biotechnology (Quality Control Biologist) to make the young biotechnologist ready to take-up jobs in industries,hospitals, R&D laboratories. HIMCOSTE is nodal agency to implement this project in Himachal Pradesh.
